name: Ottarl
description:
__Race:__ Boaz
__Height:__ 210 cm (6'11")
__Affiliation:__ Freya Familia
__Level:__ 7
__Skills:__ Vana Arganture • Stortus Ottar
__Magic:__ Hildis Vini
__Weapon:__ Supreme Black Sword • Greataxe • Great Hammer

Ottar is the captain of the Freya Familia and is currently the only Level 7 in Orario. When Ottar was a child, he was abandoned without even having known his own name. Freya found him dying in an alley somewhere and told him he was beautiful and took him into her Familia. She also gave him his name at this time. Due to her material support and emotional warmth, Freya would become everything to Ottar. Two years after joining her Familia, Ottar would become Level 2. Around this time, Mia joined the Freya Familia at the request of Freya in order to train Ottar. Ottar clashed a few times with the Zeus and Hera Familias before they were defeated by the One Eyed Black Dragon and were forced out of Orario. Each time ended in him being defeated. At some point in the past, Ottar half-killed a Balor, the Monster Rex of the 49th floor. Later, after learning about Ais defeating Udaeus by herself, he also defeated Udaeus by himself while managing to obtain the Udaeus' sword. He reached Level 6 fifteen years before his battle with Udaeus and Level 7 after defeating Zald seven years before the same battle.

Ottar is extremely loyal to Freya and will follow her orders. He is shown to not feel any jealousy toward Freya's interest in Bell and does not allow anyone to insult Freya, becoming enraged if anyone does so. Despite being a member of the Freya Familia, he has been shown to help others, such as when he used an elixir on Mikoto after she used an Ignis Fatuus. Ottar believes the opposite of Eina, believing that adventurers would never break out their shell if they didn't adventure. He is also one of the few adventurers who are still active that has clashed with the Zeus and Hera Familias. His personality is greatly influenced by his experiences facing them.
